summary: Complete visual redesign of all Flutter app screens. theme.dart: extracted AppColors class with semantic colors (bgDark, cardDark, surfaceDark, borderDark), NavigationBar fully themed with WidgetStateProperty, edge-to-edge SystemUI. login_screen: gradient background, larger logo with glow shadow, polished input fields with proper borders, animation entry. register_screen: header card with gradient icon, section labels with colored accent bars, 2-column car fields, animated success page with timing estimate pill. history_screen: filter chips (all/completed/active/cancelled), stat pills (counts per status), left accent bar on tiles, AutomaticKeepAliveClientMixin. profile_screen: dark hero card with gradient, info cards with icon containers, phone copy-to-clipboard, bottom sheet logout instead of dialog. skeleton_card: shimmer animation with color lerp between base/shine. main.dart: edge-to-edge mode, portrait lock. 0 errors, 3 info-level hints only.
current_status: Flutter app fully redesigned. Run: cd vijdon_driver_app && flutter build apk --release
